voices.name: Doga - Upbeat and Rich
voices.description: Doga - Middle aged British - Turkish voice with an Istanbul accent. This broadcast quality audio data was processed from samples with the most accurate intonation and word stress in Turkish. Well suited for corporate and industrial narration, commercials, audiobooks, medical videos, IVR phone systems and on-hold messages, training and tutorial videos, animation and video games, documentary narration, explainer videos, coach-style interactive learning, industrial narration, and all styles of eLearning.

voices.name: Doga - Audiobook Master
voices.description:
Doga V2.0 - The Multilingual Audiobook Master - Doga v2.0 is the irresistible upgrade of Turkey’s most popular AI voice, now smoother, more emotional, and endlessly captivating. Designed for immersive, multilingual audiobook narration, it flows effortlessly across genres and languages: Japanese, Hindi, Spanish, Greek, Italian, Portuguese, Polish, French, German, Arabic, Turkish, and English. Doga v2.0 doesn’t just read stories. It seduces your ears with every word. 
Smooth. Expressive. Addictive. 
Once you hear it, you’ll never go back.

voices.name: Kadir Kayışcı - Deep, Mature and Soft
voices.description: Kadir Kayışcı - A mature, reassuring and expressive voice. Ideal for news, documentaries, storytelling and commercials. With clear articulation and a strong expressive style, it establishes authority over the listener, while at the same time offering a warm and fluid narration. A versatile voice that can adapt to formal and intimate projects.
